anti_claims: This paper-module JSON row does not prove runtime correctness, release readiness, or whole-system completeness.
Legacy Markdown presence is not treated as source authority or as typed subject evidence.
Capsule-backed subject/code edges are structural references only; they do not prove implementation correctness.

compression.authority_ceiling: Real-substrate external-tool witness over bounded public toy theorems. A pass attests only that the installed Lean subprocess closed the toy positive theorems and rejected the planted oracle-leak, axiom-taint, and problem-id-memorisation negatives on these fixtures. It does NOT prove any open mathematical problem, is NOT neural theorem proving, does NOT forward oracle proof bodies, is NOT an oracle/prover authority, and does NOT authorize release, publication, production use, or source mutation. When Lean is absent the organ is locked and attests nothing at all.
compression.card: Lean Proof-Search Lab Runtime surfaces the engine-room lean_proof_search_lab capsule: a bounded and/or symbolic tactic search over public toy theorems where every candidate body is compiled by the real `lean` subprocess. It enforces three epistemic-discipline guards and self-falsifies on each: a forward oracle firewall (no proof body, oracle body, or oracle-needed premise ids may be forwarded), a #print axioms cleanliness gate (sorry-tainted candidates are rejected), and a problem-id ablation (a policy that only works because it memorised the problem id fails once the id is renamed). The organ exercises one positive case (Lean closes lab_and_intro and lab_or_comm) and four planted negatives (two oracle-firewall violations, one axiom taint, one problem-id ablation failure). It is a gated external-tool witness: with Lean installed it reports tool_present_and_verified, without Lean it is terminally locked and claims no verification. Not neural theorem proving, not a solver of any open problem, no oracle-body forwarding, no release or publication authority.
compression.one_line: Gated external-tool proof-search lab that searches toy Lean theorems, checks each candidate with the installed Lean subprocess, and rejects oracle leaks, axiom taint, and problem-id memorisation by recomputation; locked and claimless when Lean is absent.

omitted: public Markdown prose body round-trip equivalence
legacy-only subject edges not named by JSON capsules
omission_receipt.reason: Paper-module instance preserves capsule fields or a legacy Markdown path inventory. Legacy-only rows do not flip source authority; required subjects and selective law/neighbour/code edges remain residual unless source JSON names ids.

paper_module_payload.authority_ceiling: Real-substrate external-tool witness over bounded public toy theorems. A pass attests only that the installed Lean subprocess closed the toy positive theorems and rejected the planted oracle-leak, axiom-taint, and problem-id-memorisation negatives on these fixtures. It does NOT prove any open mathematical problem, is NOT neural theorem proving, does NOT forward oracle proof bodies, is NOT an oracle/prover authority, and does NOT authorize release, publication, production use, or source mutation. code_loci.role: Gated external-tool organ wrapper that surfaces the lean_proof_search_lab capsule: probes for the lean binary, runs the real proof-search over the fixture cases when Lean is present (tool_present_and_verified / tool_present_but_failed), returns a body-free terminal locked receipt when Lean is absent, and projects a result card plus body-free receipts. The runtime-spine bundle entry runs the exported bundle as a declared standalone contract without spawning Lean.

Public-safe symbolic Lean proof-search lab: a bounded and/or candidate-tactic search that compiles each candidate with the real lean subprocess, a forward oracle-leak firewall over FORBIDDEN_FORWARD_FIELDS, a problem-id ablation that fails id-memorising policies, and a #print axioms cleanliness gate that rejects sorry-tainted candidates.
